text: Seeking a challenging solution development position, with strong emphasis on Hadoop & Java technologies, where I can use my current skills to learn quickly and desire to define and create the best sol
compact_summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 11 years of experience in e-Commerce, FinTech, and Telecom domains, specializing in data engineering and system design. Proficient in building end-to-end data pipelines and implementing modern data lakehouse and warehouse solutions using technologies such as Hadoop, Spark, Hive, Kafka, Flink, and NoSQL databases (Cassandra, Cosmos DB). Experienced in leveraging Google Cloud services (DataProc, BigQuery) and hybrid integrations with Azure SQL and PostgreSQL. Skilled in designing scalable systems with C4 models and UML diagrams, and developing microservices in Java and Scala, while automating CI/CD processes with Git, Jenkins, Docker, and Kubernetes.
